_meta.howToEdit: Just modify values below, save, and refresh the browser. No code changes needed.
_meta.imageGuide: Replace image URLs in the images[] array below. Use CSS selectors as 'selector'. Example: '.homeStoryIntro_img' targets all elements with that class.
_meta.changelog: v1.2.0 — 恢复所有 Mornikar 文字替换配置（从 backup-20260505-mornikar 合并），gallery 参数保留当前值

landing.desc: Mornikar is a developer and creator focused on AI-powered tools and knowledge systems. This portfolio showcases projects that blend technology with creative problem-solving.

storyIntro.body: Bridging the gap between technical excellence and innovative design, each project represents a unique approach to solving real-world challenges.

storyProject.strapline_2: From AI assistants to knowledge platforms — building tools that empower and connect.

images._note2: src: 替换后的图片路径（放 images/ 目录），相对于服务器根目录
images._note3: backgroundImage: true → 替换 CSS background-image 而非 src

images._comment: ProjectIntro 左下角侧面图片，DOM class=homeProjectIntro__img1Wrap 内的

texts._comment: === 文字替换规则 (DOM 兜底层) ===
texts._note: original: 要替换的原始文字（完全匹配），replacement: 替换后的文字
texts._note2: 这些规则由 content-patcher.js MutationObserver 在客户端执行，作为 server.js patchNuxtHtml() 的安全网

texts.replacement: Mornikar is a developer and creator focused on AI-powered tools and knowledge systems. This portfolio showcases

texts.original: A familiar world... Set on a different path.
texts.replacement: Where code meets creativity... Explore the portfolio.

texts.original: Isolated within the New Eden safe zone, you witness humanity struggling to avoid descending into chaos.
texts.replacement: Bridging the gap between technical excellence and innovative design, each project represents a unique approach to solving real-world challenges.

texts.original: You are a Keeper: an agent of power and change in this world.
texts.replacement: Every project starts with a question: how can technology serve people better?

texts.original: What will you do with this power? Will you choose to protect or destroy? To give or to take?
texts.replacement: From AI assistants to knowledge platforms — building tools that empower and connect.

texts.original: What path will you forge as you become the Keeper of your destiny?
texts.replacement: What will you build when technology and imagination converge? Explore the portfolio and find out.

texts.original: The last stronghold of all knowledge. The Keep is where all the value accrues. A place to wonder, protect, and fight for.
texts.replacement: A curated collection of tools and systems designed to streamline development workflows and enhance productivity.

texts.original: One world, two factions. Divided in belief, united in purpose.
texts.replacement: Two sides of the same coin — the analytical mind that debugs and the creative mind that designs, working in harmony.

texts.original: The discovery of Kai, the world's primordial energy source, heralded mankind's Golden Age. Or so they believed.
texts.replacement:
AI——这个时代最伟大的发明，预示着人类迎来了黄金时代。
